qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_categoria as ID, t.c_categoria as CODE, t.d_categoria as TEXT, t.n_valor_hora, t.oi_convenio as PID FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t WHERE t.oi_categoria={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_convenio as ID, t.c_convenio as CODE, t.d_convenio as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Convenios.CONVENIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@PID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_convenio as ID, t.c_convenio as CODE, t.d_convenio as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Convenios.CONVENIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_convenio={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_categoria as ID, t.c_categoria as CODE, t.d_categoria as TEXT, t.oi_convenio as PID FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t WHERE t.c_categoria={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND t.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_convenio as ID, t.c_convenio as CODE, t.d_convenio as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Convenios.CONVENIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_categoria as ID, t.c_categoria as CODE, t.d_categoria as TEXT, t.n_valor_hora, t.oi_convenio as PID FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t WHERE t.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_convenio as ID, t.c_convenio as CODE, t.d_convenio as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Convenios.CONVENIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t.oi_convenio from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t where t.oi_categoria={#SOURCE:@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_categoria as ID, t.c_categoria as CODE, t.d_categoria as TEXT, t.n_valor_hora, t.oi_convenio as PID FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t WHERE t.oi_convenio={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
